predictions.match: Arsenal FC v Manchester City FC

result.analysis: Arsenal are top of the league with a strong home record. Man City are close behind but have shown some vulnerability away from home.  Slight edge to Arsenal based on current form and home advantage.

overUnder.analysis: Both teams have strong attacking records, with high goals for (F) values.  A high-scoring game is likely.

bothTeamsToScore.analysis: Both teams are capable of scoring.  Expect goals at both ends.
